resourceTemplates.name: eulerpool-index-constituents
resourceTemplates.title: Eulerpool index constituents
resourceTemplates.description: Returns companies that are part of a stock market index such as S&P 500, DAX, Nasdaq 100 or Dow Jones.

resourceTemplates.name: eulerpool-index-constituents-paginated
resourceTemplates.title: Eulerpool index constituents paginated
resourceTemplates.description: Returns companies in a stock market index with pagination controls using start and end offsets.
